description_long: This object represents a distorted adult pedestrian figure with elongated and stretched body parts, most notably the arms, legs, and torso. The figure appears to be wearing a short dress or skirt and a top, with high boots that reach above the ankles. The head is visible with long, straight hair, and the limbs are unnaturally extended, giving the figure a surreal, abstract appearance. The textures on the clothing and skin are warped, with some areas showing hints of patterned fabric. The overall form is humanoid but highly deformed, making it difficult to discern precise anatomical details. The object is not carrying any visible accessories or objects.
description: A highly distorted adult pedestrian figure with elongated limbs, wearing a short dress and high boots, and long straight hair. The textures and proportions are abstract and warped.
description_view_0: Front view showing the elongated legs, high boots, and the head with long hair; the torso and arms are stretched and partially visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extreme stretching of the torso and arms, with the boots and lower legs more clearly visible.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back of the head with long hair and the backs of the legs and boots; the dress is visible from behind.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the side and back, with the warped torso, legs, and boots in clear view; the head and hair are partially visible.
attribute_clothing_type: short dress with a fitted top and high boots
